6.description: (Color online) The Maximum Patience Rate Has a Moderate Impact on the CoI, Whereas the Minimum Patience Rate Has a Significant Impact on the CoI

7.description: (Color online) The CoI Is More Sensitive to Changes in θ min in the 𝑃 ⁢ 𝐶 ∩ 𝐼 ⁢ 𝑆 P ⁢ C ∩ I ⁢ S Regime than in the 𝐼 ⁢ 𝐶 ∩ 𝐼 ⁢ 𝑆 I ⁢ C ∩ I ⁢ S Regime

8.description: (Color online) A Proportional Increase in λ c and λ s , Keeping ρ and θ Fixed, Results in a Decrease in the CoI When Servers Are Patient, but an Increase in the CoI When Servers Are Impatient
